understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based world, using modifier tiles to change a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation, in order to match the requirements of goal cells. Once matched, stepping onto the goal cell completes it. All goals in a level must be completed to advance to the next level, and all levels must be won to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is turn-based. Each move (north, south, east, west) costs 1 stamina. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Losing all lives causes game over. Walls block movement; blocked directions are provided each turn and must never be chosen. Modifier tiles instantly alter the carried piece: shape modifier cycles through 6 shapes, color modifier cycles orange→blue→green→red→orange, rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise. A goal cell is activated only when the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements. You must step onto an activated goal to complete it. Stamina refill tiles restore stamina. The player must plan routes to minimize wasted moves, avoid walls, and optimize modifier usage to reach goals efficiently.
